  Thanks for contributing to ADG!
  All feature/fix pull requests MUST target the `beta` branch.
  `main` is reserved for stable releases cut by maintainers.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Base branch is **`beta`** (not `main`)
- [ ] CI passes (`npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, `npm test`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (or N/A, explain why)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or public API changed (or N/A)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:` …)
